therapy.validation: It is completely normal to feel a little anxious sometimes. You are doing well.
intervention_steps: Take a slow deep breath in for 4 counts
Hold for 4 counts
Exhale slowly for 4 counts
Repeat 3 times
therapy.grounding_statement: You are safe right now. This feeling will pass.

guided_questions: What is one small thing you can do today to feel better?
Is there someone you trust you can talk to?

therapy.validation: I hear you. Anxiety at this level can feel overwhelming but you are not alone.
intervention_steps: Identify the specific thought causing anxiety
Challenge it: is it based on fact or fear?
Replace it with a balanced thought
Write it down if possible
therapy.grounding_statement: You have handled difficult moments before. You can handle this too.

guided_questions: What would you tell a friend feeling this way?

therapy.validation: Thank you for sharing this. What you are feeling is serious and you deserve proper support.
intervention_steps: Stop and focus only on your breathing right now
Name 5 things you can see around you
Name 4 things you can touch
Consider reaching out to a mental health professional
therapy.grounding_statement: You are brave for seeking help. Professional support can make a real difference.

guided_questions: Have you spoken to anyone about how you are feeling?
Would you be open to speaking with a counselor?

therapy.validation: A little stress is normal and can even be motivating. You are managing well.
intervention_steps: Take a short 5 minute break
Stretch or take a brief walk
Prioritize your top 3 tasks for today
Celebrate small wins
therapy.grounding_statement: You are in control. One step at a time is enough.

guided_questions: What is one thing you can let go of today?
What has been working well for you lately?

therapy.validation: It sounds like you are carrying a lot right now. That takes real strength to acknowledge.
intervention_steps: Write down everything stressing you
Separate what you can and cannot control
Focus your energy only on what you can control
Set one small achievable goal for today
therapy.grounding_statement: You do not have to solve everything at once. Progress matters more than perfection.

guided_questions: What is taking up most of your mental energy right now?
What would help you feel even 10% better today?

therapy.validation: This level of stress is serious and your feelings are completely valid. You need and deserve support.
intervention_steps: Pause all non-urgent tasks if possible
Talk to someone you trust today
Focus only on basic self-care: sleep, water, food
Consider speaking to a counselor or doctor
therapy.grounding_statement: Asking for help is a sign of strength not weakness. You matter.

guided_questions: Is there anyone who can help lighten your load right now?
When did you last feel at peace and what helped then?
